title: OKPF Training Derivation Metadata
description: Optional metadata describing how training-ready derivatives were produced from OKPF source records and artifacts. This schema is permissive: all fields are optional and additional properties are allowed.

derivative_id.description: Stable identifier for this derivative dataset.

derivative_type.description: Type of derivative. Recommended values: instruction_dataset, completion_dataset, preference_dataset, classification_dataset, retrieval_eval_dataset, synthetic_qa_dataset.

derived_from.description: Source records and artifacts this derivative was produced from.

type.description: Source type. Examples: record_file, artifact, external_source.

path.description: Relative path within the pack to the source file.

transforms.description: Ordered list of transformations applied to produce the derivative.

type.description: Transform type. Examples: chunking, instruction_pair_generation, human_review, deduplication, filtering, synthetic_expansion.

tool.description: Tool or script used for this transform, if known.

example_count.description: Number of examples in the derivative dataset.

quality_notes.description: Human-authored notes on derivative quality, limitations, and intended use.

notices.description: Legal or operational notices, such as license reminders.
